summary: High‑quality audience recording captures a solid 1981 show with a tight first set and a jam‑filled second set, though no standout songs and an early loss of Lost Sailor.
review: The audience tape, transferred to FLAC16 by Doug Mow and mastered by Alex Ford, is praised as clear and well‑captured. Musically the concert delivers a consistently good performance – Jerry’s sharp lead work and Brent’s fully present keyboards are highlighted – but reviewers note there are no truly standout moments and that Lost Sailor was dropped early in the set.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show and recording positively (4‑5 stars) citing good sound and solid playing, but a zero‑star review and comments about missing highlights pull the average down to a mixed overall impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Excellent audience capture with clear FLAC16 transfer; no specific dropouts or muffling mentioned, but not described as pristine soundboard quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set of 13 songs is tight and well‑structured; second set is genuinely jammed with strong group interaction, though no particular song stands out.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Sharp playing noted by an attendee who was present at the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's keyboards are described as fully present and energetic throughout the performance.
